author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 8473755: 0.3.1 -> 0.3.2 (5 manifest strings via ripsed, main + fuzz lockfiles refreshed), CHANGELOG [Unreleased] -> [0.3.2] - 2026-06-10. Verified: 25 suites green, clippy/fmt clean, and the new semver gate run locally for all four library crates — 'no semver update required' across the board, confirming the patch bump is the right increment. Single fix in this release: #116 Windows streaming persist.
